posts.title: Building Effective Agents on Dafthunk
posts.description: How Anthropic's agent patterns map onto the Dafthunk runtime. The augmented LLM, prompt chaining, routing, parallelization, and autonomous agents, each shown as a shape on the canvas, with one catalog feeding both the node and tool registries.
posts.tagline: Anthropic's patterns drawn on a canvas where nodes and tools share one catalog.
posts.author: The Dafthunk team
